title: malephora lutea
intro: Malephora lutea, also known as the yellow rock jasmine or yellow succulent, is a species of succulent plant in the family Aizoaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Malephora lutea include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect cells from damage. Malephora lutea is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
